_about: Curated catalog of sources the Discovery agent (ARCHITECTURE.md Phase 3) monitors weekly. Three categories: web-search queries, RSS/Atom feeds, and specific watchlist pages. Each entry has `verified` to mark whether a human has confirmed the URL/query is good. The Phase 3 agent (currently the tlc-weekly-discovery-scan Cowork task) reads this file, runs each query/feed/page, filters for relevance, and opens GitHub issues for candidate sources to ingest. See discovery-sources.schema.md for field definitions.

queries.notes: Broad current-season query. Bias to news from the last 30 days.

queries.query: FLL Future Edition LEGO Education Computer Science AI
queries.notes: Track the 2026/27 transition rollout. Active interest until Future Edition is the unified program (2028/29).
2026/27 season name. Likely high signal Aug–Oct 2026.
Current 2025/26 season's Innovation Project ideas, team blog posts, expert interview write-ups. High signal during Sept-Nov.
Long-tail: coach blogs and team showcases. Less time-sensitive.
Programming approaches discussion. Useful for learning-materials.md updates.
Surface independent coach voices. Bias to recent posts; many coach blogs are dormant after a season.
Find new regional partner sites to add to fll-resource-map.md. As of 2026-05, we have HANDS on TECHNOLOGY (DACH), FIRST Washington, IET (UK), FIRST in Texas.

feeds.name: FIRST LEGO League — official YouTube
feeds.notes: Official FLL YouTube channel feed. Channel ID UCuGaG4GtEj82i3pByi_bM3A confirmed via canonical URL on the @FIRSTLEGOLeagueofficial handle. Best for season reveal videos in August.

feeds.name: r/FIRSTRobotics on Reddit
feeds.notes: Cross-program Reddit community. Skewed toward FTC/FRC but FLL questions and announcements appear. Use a relevance filter (FLL keywords) to surface FLL-specific items.

watchlist_pages.name: Global FLL homepage
watchlist_pages.look_for: Division structure changes, season-name announcements, scope changes (e.g., post-LEGO partnership end). Compare against what what-is-fll.md and fll-resource-map.md say.

watchlist_pages.name: FIRST CANOPY (2026/27 season landing)
watchlist_pages.look_for: Season-specific updates, BIOGLOW manual releases, registration windows. URL will likely rotate to /first-<next> after the 2026/27 season ends.

watchlist_pages.name: DACH partner — Future Edition page
watchlist_pages.look_for: Updated Future Edition specifics. The page promised 'further details in the coming weeks' as of Jan 2026.

watchlist_pages.name: HANDS on TECHNOLOGY news (DACH)
watchlist_pages.look_for: DACH-specific FLL news. No RSS feed available; treat as page-poll only. Look for season-update posts.

watchlist_pages.name: DACH current-season updates (UNEARTHED 2025-26)
watchlist_pages.look_for: Monthly DACH season-update newsletters. New posts under /season-updates/full-view/<slug>. Pattern note: DACH archives each season at /en/<YYYY>-<YY>-season/*; swap year to access prior seasons. Verified seasons in sitemap: 2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25, 2025-26.

watchlist_pages.name: DACH next-season updates (BIOGLOW 2026-27) — pattern-predicted
watchlist_pages.look_for: URL doesn't exist YET as of May 2026 — predicted from the DACH per-season URL pattern (/en/<YYYY>-<YY>-season/season-updates). Expected to start populating Aug 2026 when BIOGLOW season ramps up. Flip verified to true once the URL returns 200 with content. If still 404 by Sept 2026, check if the pattern changed.

watchlist_pages.name: LEGO Education partnership update page
watchlist_pages.look_for: Updated details about the 2027-2028 LEGO Education season after the FIRST partnership ends. Currently says 'we can't share more details yet' — when that changes it's a major wiki update.

watchlist_pages.name: LEGO Education FLL hub
watchlist_pages.look_for: Tone shifts re: partnership, new product/curriculum announcements tied to FLL, hardware roadmap signals.

watchlist_pages.name: LEGO Education portal
watchlist_pages.look_for: Computer Science & AI hardware announcements (Future Edition platform), SPIKE Prime / SPIKE Essential end-of-life signals (June 30, 2026 retirement is current), new product pages.

watchlist_pages.name: FIRST press room
watchlist_pages.look_for: Press releases mentioning FIRST LEGO League, season launches, partnership news, major program changes. Surface only FLL-related items.

watchlist_pages.name: FIRST Community blog — FLL feed
watchlist_pages.look_for: FIRST staff and FIRST LEGO League staff posts. High-signal channel for season launches, Dashboard / Storefront changes, Future Edition rollout, championship recaps. Surfaced examples to watch for: posts in 2026 about CANOPY registration timeline, Dashboard maintenance windows, the new Storefront launch.
